facebook.caption:
Squid noodle soup for under $15. In Phu Quoc. At a spot with 671 reviews.

Hủ Tiếu Mực Tư Hường on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is what locals actually eat. Not the beachfront tourist traps. This. Fresh mực, rich broth, prices that make no sense for an island destination.

4.3 stars and still flying under most tourist radars. That gap won't last.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the broth hit the bowl. Hủ Tiếu Mực Tư Hường, 671 reviews, under $15 a head. This is Phu Quoc eating done right.
